shared_case_surface: bounded change cases that keep requested scope, executed scope, drift class, deviation disclosure, and failure-versus-readout boundaries inspectable on the same scope-alignment surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same scope-drift question, keeps the request and executed change surface jointly inspectable, and still covers exact-scope temptation, silent widening, silent narrowing, reshaping, and disclosed deviation while preserving aligned, widening, narrowing, and reshaping as distinct drift classes and explicit-versus-silent disclosure as a real review surface.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can inspect the requested scope directly
the executed change surface remains visible enough to assign a drift class
explicit deviation stays distinguishable from silent drift
the public readout stays weaker than the request-versus-execution evidence
